Name: [Performance] Remove auto-date table
Description: Avoid using auto-date tables. Make sure to turn off auto-date table in the settings in Power BI Desktop. This will save memory resources.
Expression:
ObjectTypeName == "Calculated Table"

and

(
Name.StartsWith("DateTableTemplate_") 

or 

Name.StartsWith("LocalDateTable_")
)

Name: [Error Prevention] Data columns must have a source column
Description: Data columns must have a source column. A data column without a source column will cause an error when processing the model.

Name: [Error Prevention] Expression-reliant objects must have an expression
Description: Calculated columns, calculation items and measures must have an expression. Without an expression, these objects will not show any values.

Name: [Error Prevention] Relationship columns should be of the same data type
Description: Columns used in a relationship should be of the same data type.

Name: [DAX Expressions] Column references should be fully qualified
Description: Using fully qualified column references makes DAX easier to reason about and reduces ambiguity.

Name: [DAX Expressions] Measure references should be unqualified
Description: Measure references should use the measure name only, without the table qualifier.

Name: [DAX Expressions] Use the DIVIDE function for division
Description: Use DIVIDE instead of the / operator to handle divide-by-zero safely.

Name: [DAX Expressions] Avoid using the IFERROR function
Description: Avoid IFERROR in DAX. Prefer patterns such as DIVIDE that naturally handle errors.

Name: [Formatting] Provide format string for measures
Description: Visible measures should have a format string assigned.
Expression:
not IsHidden 
and not Table.IsHidden 
and string.IsNullOrWhitespace(FormatString) 
and string.IsNullOrWhitespace(FormatStringExpression)

Name: [Formatting] Hide foreign keys
Description: Foreign keys should be hidden from report authors.
Expression:
UsedInRelationships.Any(FromColumn.Name == current.Name and FromCardinality == "Many")

and

IsHidden == false

Name: [Formatting] Mark primary keys
Description: Set the Key property to true for one-side relationship keys.
Expression:
UsedInRelationships.Any(ToTable.Name == current.Table.Name and ToColumn.Name == current.Name and ToCardinality == "One")

and

IsKey == false
and
current.Table.DataCategory != "Time"
